'''kakopo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:xylogalacturonan|xylogalacturonan]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-k-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xylogalacturonan|xylogalacturonan]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| kakopo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:kækepeth|kækepeth]] || [[word:kækepej|kækepej]] || [[word:kækepesh|kækepesh]] || [[word:kækepe|kækepe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:kakokopoth|kakokopoth]] || [[word:kakokopoj|kakokopoj]] || [[word:kakokoposh|kakokoposh]] || [[word:kakokopo|kakokopo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:kakopoth|kakopoth]] || [[word:kakopoj|kakopoj]] || [[word:kakoposh|kakoposh]] || [[word:kakopo|kakopo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:kakofpoth|kakofpoth]] || [[word:kakofpoj|kakofpoj]] || [[word:kakofposh|kakofposh]] || [[word:kakofpof|kakofpof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:kakopotho|kakopotho]] || [[word:kakopojo|kakopojo]] || [[word:kakoposho|kakoposho]] || [[word:kakopoko|kakopoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:kakopoth|kakopoth]] || [[word:kakopoj|kakopoj]] || [[word:kakoposh|kakoposh]] || [[word:kakopo|kakopo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:kakopothol|kakopothol]] || [[word:kakopojol|kakopojol]] || [[word:kakoposhol|kakoposhol]] || [[word:kakopokol|kakopokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:kakopothotho|kakopothotho]] || [[word:kakopojojo|kakopojojo]] || [[word:kakoposhosho|kakoposhosho]] || [[word:kakopoko|kakopoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:kakopothon|kakopothon]] || [[word:kakopojon|kakopojon]] || [[word:kakoposhon|kakoposhon]] || [[word:kakopokon|kakopokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:kakopothoro|kakopothoro]] || [[word:kakopojoro|kakopojoro]] || [[word:kakoposhoro|kakoposhoro]] || [[word:kakopokoro|kakopokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
